title: dortmanna collina
intro: Dortmanna collina, also known as sweet woodruff, is a low-growing perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its sweet-scented leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and insomnia. The medicinal properties of Dortmanna collina include its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its sweet flavor and fragrance.
